title: Golden Roasted Syrian Shrimp Skewers
description: Quick and flavorful Syrian dish featuring succulent shrimp, cranberry juice, and dashi extract, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This pescatarian-friendly recipe is easy to make and packed with protein.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together cranberry juice, dashi extract, olive oil, garlic, salt, black pepper, and paprika.
Add the shrimp to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated shrimp onto skewers, leaving a small space between each shrimp.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Roast the shrimp in the preheated oven for 8-10 minutes, or until they are pink and cooked through.
Remove the skewers from the oven and serve immediately.
Garnish with fresh parsley or cilantro, if desired.
